name: No Bake Custard (Keto & Carnivore-Friendly)
description: This no bake keto carnivore custard has the same great flavor and silky smooth texture as traditional custard but is less work to make! Make it yourself with just 5 ingredients and 10 minutes of prep time.

author.name: Jessica Haggard
author.description: Jessica Haggard is the creator of Primal Edge Health, where she shares simple, nourishing low-carb, keto, and carnivore diet recipes. She has photographed and authored two best-selling ketogenic cookbooks, The Ketogenic Edge Cookbook and The Carnivore Cookbook.

recipeInstructions.name: Sprinkle
recipeInstructions.text: Sprinkle the gelatin over 2 tablespoons of water in a wide, shallow dish. The more surface area to cover, the better. Set aside to thicken.

recipeInstructions.name: Add
recipeInstructions.text: If sweetening: Warm the cream over low heat in a small saucepan on the stovetop. Add the sweetener and stir until it dissolves. Then stir in vanilla.If not sweetening: Add vanilla to half and half in a bowl without heating.

recipeInstructions.name: Whisk
recipeInstructions.text: Whisk egg yolks into the half and half.

recipeInstructions.name: Mix
recipeInstructions.text: Mix in the gelatin. Gently warm liquid over low heat until gelatin dissolves if needed.

recipeInstructions.name: Chill
recipeInstructions.text: Divide into individual ramekins or use one single serving dish. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour until set. Serve cold.
